question: Design a C++ class named `Book` with private member variables for `title` (string), `author` (string), and `isbn` (string). Provide public getter and setter methods for each attribute.

test_cases.expected:
Initial Book Details:
Title: The Great Adventure
Author: Jane Doe
ISBN: 978-0123456789

Updated Book Details:
Title: The New Journey
Author: John Smith
ISBN: 978-9876543210

errors: Missing a semicolon after the class definition of `Book`. In C++, class declarations must be terminated with a semicolon.
